# bingogen Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2026-03-01

## Active Technologies
- TypeScript 5, Node.js 20+ + Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS 4 (003-card-persistence)
- MongoDB Atlas (M0 free tier) — JSON documents via native `mongodb` driver (003-card-persistence)

- TypeScript 5.x (strict mode) / Node.js 20+ + Next.js 15 (App Router), React 19, Tailwind CSS 4, react-markdown (for Markdown rendering) (001-card-creation-ux)

## Project Structure

```text
src/
tests/
```

## Commands

npm test && npm run lint

## Code Style

TypeScript 5.x (strict mode) / Node.js 20+: Follow standard conventions
